projectDescription: An AI-powered video ad personalization platform that identifies the best product SKU for a viewer, finds the optimal ad placement in a video clip, and seamlessly splices a generated ad segment using Gemini and ElevenLabs.
keyFeatures: AI-powered viewer-to-product matching using Google Gemini
Automated video scene breakdown and ad placement analysis
Gemini image editing to place products physically on characters in frames
ElevenLabs voice cloning for natural voiceover in character's voice
ffmpeg-based video splicing to seamlessly insert 3-second ad segments
Three-step pipeline: identify product → analyze video → generate merged video
Web UI for manual interaction with the full pipeline
Configurable via environment variables with sensible defaults
